SEARCH

All Classes and Interfaces

Class
Description
AbstractKeyMetamodel<T,E,V>
Extension of AbstractMetamodel that implements Metamodel.Key, indicating that the field has a uniqueness constraint.
AbstractMetamodel<T,E,V>
Implementation that is used by the generated models.
AliasedTable
Represents a reference to a table qualified with an alias.
BindHint
Marker interface that represents a binding hint used during SQL template binding.
BindHint.NoBindHint
Represents the absence of a binding hint.
BindVars
Marker interface used within an SQL template to indicate where bind variables (parameters) should be injected.
BindVars.RecordListener
A listener for record events within a SQL query context.
BindVarsHandle
Handle used to process bind variables.
Cacheable
Wrapper element that marks an Elements.Expression as cacheable during template compilation.
CacheRetention
Controls the retention behavior of the transaction-scoped entity cache.
CapturedStatement
Represents a captured SQL statement with its operation type and bound parameters.
CapturedStatement.Operation
Classifies the type of SQL operation.
Column
Represents a column in a database table.
Column
Represents metadata about a single column in a database table, as derived from the entity or projection model.
ColumnExpression
Represents a reference to a column qualified by a table alias, with optional SQL expression override.
ColumnImpl
Represents a column in a database table.
ColumnName
 
ColumnNameResolver
Resolves the column name for a record component.
ConnectionProvider
The connection provider is responsible for providing connections to the database.
Convert
Declares how a Converter should be applied.
Converter<D,E>
Converts between an entity value type and a database column type.
Data
Marker interface for record-based data classes.
DatabaseSchema
Reads JDBC DatabaseMetaData into an in-memory representation for schema validation.
DatabaseSchema.DbColumn
Represents a column discovered from the database metadata.
DatabaseSchema.DbForeignKey
Represents a foreign key relationship discovered from the database metadata.
DatabaseSchema.DbPrimaryKey
Represents a primary key column discovered from the database metadata.
DatabaseSchema.DbUniqueKey
Represents a column that is part of a unique index discovered from the database metadata.
DbColumn
Specifies the name for the column, table or view.
DbColumns
Annotation for specifying multiple database column names, e.g., for compound keys.
DbEnum
Specifies how an enum should be mapped when reading or writing to a column.
DbIgnore
Suppresses schema validation for the annotated entity type or record component.
DbTable
Specifies the schema name for the table or view.
DefaultConnectionProviderImpl
 
DefaultConverter
Marks a Converter as eligible for automatic application when its entity type matches a type and no explicit @Convert annotation is present.
DefaultEntityRepositoryProviderImpl
Provider for default entity repositories.
DefaultJoinType
Default implementation of the JoinType interface used to represent the default join types.
DefaultORMConverterImpl<D,E>
 
DefaultORMConverterProviderImpl
 
DefaultORMReflectionImpl
 
DefaultORMReflectionProviderImpl
 
DefaultProjectionRepositoryProviderImpl
Provider for default projection repositories.
DefaultQueryBuilderProviderImpl
Default implementation of QueryBuilderProvider that are based on SelectBuilderImpl and DeleteBuilderImpl.
DefaultSqlDialect
 
DefaultSqlDialectProviderImpl
 
DefaultTransactionTemplateProviderImpl
 
DeleteBuilderImpl<T,ID>
A query builder for DELETE queries.
DirtyCheck
Defines how dirty checking is performed for an entity.
DirtyCheckMetrics
Singleton JMX MBean for dirty checking metrics.
DirtyCheckMetricsMXBean
JMX MXBean interface for dirty checking metrics.
DirtySupport<E,ID>
Determines which fields of an entity are considered dirty for update purposes.
Discriminator
Configures discriminator behavior for sealed type hierarchies.
Discriminator.DiscriminatorType
The discriminator column types supported for sealed type hierarchies.
DynamicUpdate
Configures how changes are detected and how UPDATE statements are generated for a specific entity.
Element
Represents an element in a ST/ORM SQL query.
Elements
 
Elements.Alias
 
Elements.BindVar
 
Elements.Column
 
Elements.Delete
 
Elements.Expression
 
Elements.From
 
Elements.Insert
 
Elements.ObjectExpression
 
Elements.Param
 
Elements.Select
 
Elements.Set
 
Elements.Source
 
Elements.Subquery
 
Elements.Table
 
Elements.TableSource
 
Elements.TableTarget
 
Elements.Target
 
Elements.TemplateExpression
 
Elements.TemplateSource
 
Elements.TemplateTarget
 
Elements.Unsafe
 
Elements.Update
 
Elements.Values
 
Elements.Where
 
Entity<ID>
Optional marker interface for record-based entities.
EntityCache<E,ID>
Transaction-local cache that interns entities by primary key.
EntityCacheImpl<E,ID>
Transaction-local cache that interns entities by primary key with configurable retention behavior.
EntityCacheMetrics
Singleton JMX MBean for entity cache metrics.
EntityCacheMetricsMXBean
JMX MXBean interface for entity cache metrics.
EntityCallback<E>
Typed callback interface for entity lifecycle events.
EntityRepository<E,ID>
Provides a generic interface with CRUD operations for entities.
EntityRepository<E,ID>
Provides a generic interface with CRUD operations for entities.
EntityRepositoryImpl<E,ID>
Default implementation of EntityRepository.
EntityRepositoryProvider
Provides pluggable entity repository logic.
EnumType
Defines the strategy to use when mapping enums.
EqualitySupport
Builds allocation-free equality checks for metamodel fields backed by MethodHandle.
ExceptionHelper
Helper class for augmenting exceptions with SQL statements.
FK
Marks a field as a foreign key.
ForeignKeyResolver
Resolves the column name for a foreign key component.
GenerateMetamodel
Indicates that a metamodel class should be generated for the annotated record.
GenerationStrategy
Defines the strategy to use when generating values for primary keys.
Identical<T>
Identity comparison on an extracted field value.
Inline
Indicates that the underlying fields of the record component are inlined in this record.
JoinBuilder<T,R,ID>
A builder for constructing join clause of the query using custom join conditions.
JoinBuilder<T,R,ID>
A builder for specifying the ON condition of a JOIN clause using a custom string template expression.
JoinedEntityHelper
Utility for handling multi-table DML operations for joined sealed entity types (Joined Table inheritance).
JoinType
Represents a join type in a SQL query.
JpaTemplate
A template backed by JPA.
JpaTemplateImpl
 
Json
Marks a record component as a json object.
LazySupplier<T>
Returns a lazily initialized value.
LruCache<K,V>
A simple in-memory Least Recently Used (LRU) cache.
Metamodel<T,E>
The metamodel provides type-safe references to entity fields for use in queries.
Metamodel.Key<T,E>
Marker interface for metamodel fields that correspond to columns known to be unique.
Metamodel.KeyDelegate<T,E>
Delegating wrapper that adds the Metamodel.Key marker to an existing Metamodel instance.
MetamodelFactory
Implementation that is used by the generated models.
MetamodelType
Marks an annotation type to be represented as the specified type in the Metamodel.
Model<E,ID>
Represents the model of an entity or projection.
Model<E,ID>
Provides metadata about an entity or projection type, including its table name, primary key type, and column definitions.
ModelBuilder
Builder for creating a model.
ModelImpl<E,ID>
Default Model implementation backed by RecordType and precomputed column metadata.
MySQLEntityRepositoryImpl<E,ID>
Implementation of EntityRepository for MySQL.
MySQLEntityRepositoryProviderImpl
Implementation of EntityRepositoryProvider for MySQL.
MySQLProviderFilter
Provider filter to select the MariaDB entity repository provider.
MySQLSqlDialect
 
MySQLSqlDialectProviderImpl
Implementation of SqlDialectProvider for MySQL.
Name
Represents a name of a database object.
NonUniqueResultException
Thrown when getSingleResult is executed on a query and there is more than one result from the query.
NoResultException
Thrown when getSingleResult is executed on a query and there is no result to return.
ObjectMapper<T>
Mapper for creating instances of a specific type.
ObjectMapperFactory
Factory for creating instances of a specific type.
Operator
Represents a comparison operator in a SQL query.
OptimisticLockException
Thrown when an optimistic locking conflict occurs.
Orderable<T>
Interface for classes that can be ordered.
Orderable.After
Ordering constraint that indicates that the current class should come after the specified classes.
Orderable.AfterAny
Ordering constraint that indicates that the current class should come after any other class.
Orderable.Before
Ordering constraint that indicates that the current class should come before the specified classes.
Orderable.BeforeAny
Ordering constraint that indicates that the current class should come before any other class.
ORMConverter
Interface for converting ORM parameters to SQL parameters.
ORMConverter.NameResolver
Interface for resolving names of record components.
ORMConverterProvider
Provides pluggable ORM converter logic for record fields.
ORMReflection
Provides pluggable reflection support for the ORM to support different JVM languages, such as Java and Kotlin.
ORMReflectionProvider
Provides pluggable ORM reflection logic.
ORMTemplate
The ORMTemplate is the primary interface that extends the QueryTemplate and RepositoryLooking interfaces, providing access to both the SQL Template engine and ORM logic.
ORMTemplate
The primary entry point for Storm's ORM functionality, combining SQL template query construction with repository access.
ORMTemplateImpl
 
Page<R>
Represents a page of query results for offset-based pagination.
Pageable
Represents a pagination request with a zero-based page number, page size, and optional sort orders.
Pageable.Order
Represents a sort order for a single metamodel field.
Persist
Allows the persistence properties of a record component to be configured.
PersistenceException
Thrown when a database or sql problem occurs.
PK
Marks a field as the primary key of an entity.
Polymorphic
Specifies the inheritance strategy for a sealed entity hierarchy.
Polymorphic.Strategy
The inheritance strategies for sealed entity hierarchies.
PredicateBuilder<T,R,ID>
A builder for constructing the predicates of the WHERE clause of the query.
PredicateBuilder<T,R,ID>
Represents a composable predicate for the WHERE clause of a query, supporting AND and OR composition.
PredicateBuilderFactory
Factory for creating instances of PredicateBuilder.
PreparedQuery
Represents a prepared query that can be executed multiple times, allows adding records to a batch and retrieving generated keys.
PreparedQuery
Represents an eagerly constructed, reusable query that supports batch operations and generated key retrieval.
PreparedStatementTemplate
A template backed by JDBC.
PreparedStatementTemplateImpl
 
Projection<ID>
Marker interface for record-based projections.
ProjectionQuery
Projection records marked with this annotation type can specify a SQL query that represents the projection.
ProjectionRepository<P,ID>
Provides a generic interface with read operations for projections.
ProjectionRepository<P,ID>
Provides a generic interface with read operations for projections.
ProjectionRepositoryImpl<P,ID>
Default implementation of ProjectionRepository.
ProjectionRepositoryProvider
Provides pluggable projection repository logic.
Provider
Base interface for service provider interfaces of the storm framework.
Providers
Helper class for loading providers from the storm framework.
Query
Abstraction for DQL (Data Query Language) statements, such as SELECT queries and DML (Data Manipulation Language) statements, such as INSERT, UPDATE and DELETE statements
Query
Represents a constructed SQL statement that is ready for execution.
QueryBuilder<T,R,ID>
A query builder that constructs a query from a template.
QueryBuilder<T,R,ID>
A fluent builder for constructing type-safe SELECT and DELETE queries using the entity graph and metamodel.
QueryBuilderProvider
Provides pluggable query builder logic.
QueryFactory
Factory for creating queries.
QueryTemplate
The query template is used to construct queries.
QueryTemplate
Provides methods for constructing SQL queries and query builders using String Templates or the fluent API.
RecordField
Represents metadata about a field in a data record type.
RecordType
Represents metadata about a data record type.
Ref<T>
Ref records are used to represent reference to records, allowing them to be fetched from the database.
RefFactory
Interface for creating ref instances for records.
RefFactoryImpl
Implementation of RefFactory.
Repository
Base interface for all repositories.
Repository
Base interface for all Storm repositories, providing access to the underlying ORMTemplate.
RepositoryAopAutoConfiguration
 
RepositoryBeanFactoryPostProcessor
BeanFactoryPostProcessor that scans base packages for Repository interfaces and registers them as beans.
RepositoryBeanFactoryPostProcessor.RepositoryAutowireCandidateResolver
Qualifier-aware AutowireCandidateResolver that reads "qualifier" attribute (set on the repository bean definitions we register).
RepositoryLookup
Provides access to repositories.
RepositoryLookup
Provides access to repositories.
RepositoryProxyingPostProcessor
 
ResolverRegistration
Registers a resolver bean in the Spring application context.
ResolveScope
Enumeration of the different modes for resolving an alias.
Same<T>
Value comparison on an extracted field value.
SchemaValidationError
Describes a single mismatch between an entity definition and the database schema.
SchemaValidationError.ErrorKind
The category of a schema validation error.
SchemaValidationException
Thrown when schema validation detects one or more mismatches between entity definitions and the database schema.
SchemaValidator
Validates entity and projection definitions against the actual database schema.
SegmentedLruCache<K,V>
A sharded LRU cache optimized for concurrent, read-dominated workloads.
SelectBuilderImpl<T,R,ID>
A query builder for SELECT queries.
SelectMode
Specifies how much data a query should select for an entity or projection.
Slice<R>
Represents a slice of query results, typically used for keyset-based pagination.
Sql
Represents the generated SQL statement with parameters.
SqlCompiler
Represents the SQL result of processing a template element.
SqlDialect
Represents a specific SQL dialect with methods to determine feature support and handle identifier escaping.
SqlDialect.ConstraintDiscoveryStrategy
Strategy for discovering primary keys, unique keys, and foreign keys in the database schema.
SqlDialect.SequenceDiscoveryStrategy
Strategy for discovering sequences in the database schema.
SqlDialectProvider
Provides the SQL dialect.
SqlInterceptor
Interceptor for SQL statement generation events.
SqlInterceptorManager
Manages SQL interceptors.
SqlInterceptorManager.Carrier
 
SqlLog
Annotation for capturing and logging SQL statements.
SqlLogInterceptor
Shared utility for processing SqlLog annotations in repository proxies.
SqlOperation
Represents the SQL mode.
SqlTemplate
A template processor for generating SQL queries.
SqlTemplate.BatchListener
A listener for batch events within a SQL query context.
SqlTemplate.BindVariables
Manages the binding of variables in a SQL query.
SqlTemplate.NamedParameter
Represents a named parameter that can be used in an SQL query.
SqlTemplate.Parameter
Represents a parameter that can be used in an SQL query.
SqlTemplate.PositionalParameter
Represents a positional parameter that can be used in an SQL query.
SqlTemplate.RecordListener
A listener for record events within a SQL query context.
SqlTemplateException
Thrown to indicate an error occurred while processing a SQL template.
SqlTemplateImpl
The sql template implementation that is responsible for generating SQL queries.
StatementCapture
Captures SQL statements generated during the execution of an action.
StormConfig
Immutable, untyped configuration for the Storm ORM framework.
StormExtension
JUnit 5 extension that provides automatic DataSource creation and parameter injection for Storm tests.
StormModule
Jackson module for serializing and deserializing Storm ORM Data types.
StormTest
Annotation for Storm integration tests.
StreamSupport
Helper class for working with streams.
StreamSupport.Partition<K,V>
A partition produced by StreamSupport.partitioned(Stream, int, Function) or its overloads.
StringTemplates
Utility class for processing string templates.
Subqueryable
The query template is used to construct queries that may be linked to the outer query.
SubqueryTemplate
The subquery template is used to construct subqueries that can be linked to the outer query.
SubqueryTemplate
Provides factory methods for constructing subqueries that can be correlated with or embedded in an outer query.
TableAliasResolver
Resolves the alias for a table.
TableName
 
TableNameResolver
Resolves the table name for a given record type.
TemplateBuilder
Provides support for Java-style string templates without preview features.
TemplateBuilder.Context
Context for injecting arguments into the template.
TemplateDecorator
Decorator used for integrations with applications and frameworks.
TemplateMetrics
Singleton JMX MBean for SQL template cache metrics.
TemplateMetrics.Request
 
TemplateMetricsMXBean
JMX MXBean interface for template cache metrics.
Templates
The Templates interface provides a collection of static methods for constructing SQL query elements and creating ORM repository templates.
Templates
The Templates interface provides a collection of static methods for constructing SQL query elements and creating ORM repository templates.
TemplateString
Holds the pieces of a split template string and the values that will be inserted between them.
TemporalType
Represents the type of a temporal attribute.
TransactionAwareConnectionProviderImpl
 
TransactionCallback<T>
Callback interface for transactional code.
TransactionContext
 
TransactionContext.Decorator<T>
Decorates a transaction resource before it is used.
TransactionStatus
Provides access to transaction status.
TransactionTemplate
The transaction template is a functional interface that allows callers to let logic be executed in the scope of a new transaction.
TransactionTemplateProvider
The transaction template provider is responsible for integration with the Transaction subsystem.
TypeCompatibility
Determines whether a Java type is compatible with a SQL column type.
TypeCompatibility.Compatibility
Describes the compatibility between a Java type and a SQL column type.
TypeDiscovery
 
TypedJoinBuilder<T,R,ID>
A builder for constructing join clause of the query.
TypedJoinBuilder<T,R,ID>
A builder for specifying the ON condition of a JOIN clause using a type-safe entity relation or a custom expression.
UK
Marks a field as a unique key.
UpdateMode
Controls how changes are detected and how UPDATE statements are generated for entities.
Version
Marks a record component as a version field to detect optimistic locking conflicts.
WeakInterner
A weak interner that ensures canonical instances of objects while holding them weakly to permit garbage collection.
WhereBuilder<T,R,ID>
A builder for constructing the WHERE clause of the query.
WhereBuilder<T,R,ID>
A builder for constructing the WHERE clause of a query, providing type-safe predicate construction.
